final:
module RefModule(
    input  wire        CLK,
    input  wire        RST,
    input  wire        EN,
    output wire [3:0]  Q
);reg [3:0] count;

      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge CLK or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (RST) begin
            count <= 4'b0;
        end
        else if (EN) begin
            count <= count + 1;
        end
    end

    assign Q = count;

endmodule
